testcase.name: JWT Token Validation missing token → 401

testcase.classname: OTP Authentication Flow send OTP → returns ok
testcase.name: OTP Authentication Flow send OTP → returns ok

testcase.name: OTP Authentication Flow verify wrong OTP → 400

testcase.name: OTP Authentication Flow OTP is single-use — second verify → 400

testcase.classname: OTP Authentication Flow verify OTP that was never sent → 400
testcase.name: OTP Authentication Flow verify OTP that was never sent → 400

testcase.classname: Security Headers (Helmet) X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff is set
testcase.name: Security Headers (Helmet) X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff is set

testcase.classname: Security Headers (Helmet) X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN is set (clickjacking protection)
testcase.name: Security Headers (Helmet) X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN is set (clickjacking protection)

testcase.classname: Security Headers (Helmet) X-Powered-By header is hidden
testcase.name: Security Headers (Helmet) X-Powered-By header is hidden

testcase.classname: Security Headers (Helmet) Strict-Transport-Security header is present
testcase.name: Security Headers (Helmet) Strict-Transport-Security header is present

testcase.classname: Security Headers (Helmet) Content-Security-Policy header is set
testcase.name: Security Headers (Helmet) Content-Security-Policy header is set

testcase.classname: CORS Policy allowed origin → CORS headers present
testcase.name: CORS Policy allowed origin → CORS headers present

testcase.classname: CORS Policy disallowed origin → no CORS allow-origin header
testcase.name: CORS Policy disallowed origin → no CORS allow-origin header

testcase.classname: CORS Policy no origin header → request allowed (same-origin)
testcase.name: CORS Policy no origin header → request allowed (same-origin)

testcase.classname: CORS Policy OPTIONS preflight for allowed origin → 204
testcase.name: CORS Policy OPTIONS preflight for allowed origin → 204

testcase.classname: API Rate Limiting requests within limit → 200
testcase.name: API Rate Limiting requests within limit → 200

testcase.classname: API Rate Limiting RateLimit-Limit header present on response
testcase.name: API Rate Limiting RateLimit-Limit header present on response

testcase.classname: API Rate Limiting RateLimit-Remaining decrements with each request
testcase.name: API Rate Limiting RateLimit-Remaining decrements with each request

testcase.classname: API Rate Limiting exceeding rate limit → 429 Too Many Requests
testcase.name: API Rate Limiting exceeding rate limit → 429 Too Many Requests

testcase.classname: API Rate Limiting 429 response includes Retry-After or RateLimit-Reset header
testcase.name: API Rate Limiting 429 response includes Retry-After or RateLimit-Reset header

testcase.classname: Auth Route Rate Limits OTP limiter: first 5 requests pass (skipSuccessful counts errors only)
testcase.name: Auth Route Rate Limits OTP limiter: first 5 requests pass (skipSuccessful counts errors only)

testcase.name: Auth Route Rate Limits auth login rate limit allows 10 requests

testcase.name: Auth Route Rate Limits auth login rate limit blocks 11th request

testcase.name: Input Sanitization normal email passes through

testcase.name: Input Sanitization excessively long email → 400

testcase.name: Input Sanitization non-string email type → 400

testcase.name: Input Sanitization payload over 1mb limit → 413

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) returns 200 with {status: ok}
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) returns 200 with {status: ok}

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) responds quickly (< 200ms)
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) responds quickly (< 200ms)

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) returns JSON content-type
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) returns JSON content-type

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) does NOT include database fields (no DB query)
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health (lightweight ping) does NOT include database fields (no DB query)

testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health/ready (deep check) DB connected → 200 with ready status

testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health/ready (deep check) DB connected → includes uptime

testcase.classname: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health/ready (deep check) DB disconnected → 503 with degraded status
testcase.name: Health Check Endpoints GET /api/health/ready (deep check) DB disconnected → 503 with degraded status
